narrative.description: Nintendo's Zapper light-gun classic tasks players with shooting ducks flushed from the grass before they escape, with the dog's reactions providing iconic feedback across increasing difficulty rounds.
narrative.core_loop: Aim the Zapper at flying ducks, lead targets across the screen, and meet the round quota before three escapes fail the stage.

mechanics.map_notes: Zapper trigger fires immediately at screen coordinates.
mechanics.expression: Zapper trigger fires immediately at screen coordinates.

mechanics.map_notes: Three misses per round fail the stage; ten-round structure per game.
mechanics.expression: Three misses per round fail the stage; ten-round structure per game.

mechanics.map_notes: Rounds advance with faster ducks and tighter quotas.
mechanics.expression: Rounds advance with faster ducks and tighter quotas.

mechanics.map_notes: Miss counter acts as failure pool before round ends.
mechanics.expression: Miss counter acts as failure pool before round ends.

mechanics.map_notes: Ducks arc predictably once flight pattern begins.
mechanics.expression: Ducks arc predictably once flight pattern begins.

mechanics.map_notes: Clay shooting bonus rounds follow fixed launch angles.
mechanics.expression: Clay shooting bonus rounds follow fixed launch angles.

mechanics.map_notes: Two-duck volleys create cross-screen target priority decisions.
mechanics.expression: Two-duck volleys create cross-screen target priority decisions.

mechanics.map_notes: Bonus round clay pigeons reward accuracy streaks.
mechanics.expression: Bonus round clay pigeons reward accuracy streaks.

mechanics.map_notes: Tree and bush occlusion forces target reacquisition.
mechanics.expression: Tree and bush occlusion forces target reacquisition.

mechanics.map_notes: Round completion saves progress within the ten-round set.
mechanics.expression: Round completion saves progress within the ten-round set.

mechanics.map_notes: Duck speed increases in later rounds.
mechanics.expression: Duck speed increases in later rounds.

mechanics.map_notes: Platform sections demand accurate jump and movement timing. (Duck Hunt)
mechanics.expression: Platform sections demand accurate jump and movement timing. (Duck Hunt)

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Duck Hunt through its core shooter loop.
